title: WENLISELL 300 PCS White Rectangle Lace Paper Doilies, 25x35cm Cake Packaging Paper Pad, Lace Papers Doilies for Wedding, Party, Birthday, Decoration
features: LACE PAPER DOILIES: Our set includes 300 rectangular paper cutlery, they measure 35 x 25 cm / 13.8 x 9.84 inch
MATERIAL: Lace paper doilies are each made of greaseproof paper with lace cut-out design, practical and beautiful

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS: Cake packaging paper pad is non-stick and can be used to display desserts, chips, sandwiches, biscuits, treats, muffins and pastries at parties, birthdays, weddings, or for entertaining at home

VINTAGE DESIGN: Our cake packaging paper pad is designed with vintage lace edges, this design is hollowed out; They can be used for a wide variety of events and occasions; Since they are white, there will be many different themes, both vintage and fashionable styles
DECORATIVE TABLEWARE: Lace paper doilies is fit for table decorations for weddings, family celebrations, birthdays and so on
description: Product Description Package included: 300 x Lace Paper Doilies White Rectangle Lace Paper Doilies Feature: Lacy lace design, retro fashion style Wide range of applications Non-Stick Specification: Material: Paper Size: 35 x 25 cm / 13.8 x 9.84 inch Color: White
